title: 12PA Pastel Highlighters | 6 Assorted Colours
features: ✔ Chisel Tipped for Broad and Thin Lines - 1 to 5 mm
✔ Packed in Cardboard Box with Window
✔ A Quality product from 12PA - A British Stationery Brand
description: Discover the vibrant world of stationery with these 12PA Pastel Highlighters, featuring 6 assorted pastel colors. Each highlighter is equipped with a chisel tip, allowing you to create lines ranging from 1 to 5 mm in width, making it perfect for both broad and thin highlighting. The water-based ink is non-toxic and safe for kids, ensuring a worry-free experience. The easy-to-grip barrel provides a comfortable hold, enhancing your writing experience. This set of 6 highlighters is great for work or school and is packed in a cardboard box with a window, making it an ideal gift or a perfect addition to your stationery collection. The long-lasting ink ensures that your highlights stay bright for a long time. This quality product is brought to you by 12PA, a British stationery brand known for its commitment to excellence.
